heading: Applicability to other laws; national forest lands
label: 670e Applicability to other laws; national forest lands
text: Nothing herein contained shall be construed to modify, amend or repeal any provision of , nor as applying to national forest lands administered pursuant to the provisions of (), nor .Public Law 85–337section 9 of the Act of June 7, 192443 Stat. 655section 315m of title 43
